member.name: T:ATMConsoleApp.DataAccess.IAccountRepository
member.summary: Defines the contract for account data access operations.

member.name: M:ATMConsoleApp.DataAccess.IAccountRepository.GetAccountByLoginAndPin(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves an account by login and PIN.

member.name: M:ATMConsoleApp.DataAccess.IAccountRepository.GetAccountById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves an account by its ID.

member.name: M:ATMConsoleApp.DataAccess.IAccountRepository.UpdateAccountBalance(System.Int32,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Updates the balance of a specific account.

member.name: T:ATMConsoleApp.DataAccess.MySqlAccountRepository
member.summary: Provides data access operations for ATM Accounts using a MySQL database.

member.name: M:ATMConsoleApp.DataAccess.MySqlAccountRepository.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:ATMConsoleApp.DataAccess.MySqlAccountRepository.GetAccountById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves an account by its unique ID.
member.param: The unique identifier for the account.
member.returns: An object if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:ATMConsoleApp.DataAccess.MySqlAccountRepository.GetAccountByLoginAndPin(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and retrieves their account based on login and PIN.
member.returns: An object if credentials match; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:ATMConsoleApp.DataAccess.MySqlAccountRepository.UpdateAccountBalance(System.Int32,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Updates the financial balance of a specific account in the database.
member.param: The unique identifier of the account to update.

member.name: T:ATMConsoleApp.Models.Account
member.summary: Represents a user account in the ATM system.

member.name: P:ATMConsoleApp.Models.Account.AccountId
member.summary: Gets the unique account identifier.

member.name: P:ATMConsoleApp.Models.Account.Login
member.summary: Gets the login username.

member.name: P:ATMConsoleApp.Models.Account.PinCode
member.summary: Gets the 5-digit pin code.

member.name: P:ATMConsoleApp.Models.Account.Role
member.summary: Gets the role of the user (Customer or Administrator).

member.name: P:ATMConsoleApp.Models.Account.HolderName
member.summary: Gets the full name of the account holder.

member.name: P:ATMConsoleApp.Models.Account.Balance
member.summary: Gets the current financial balance of the account.

member.name: P:ATMConsoleApp.Models.Account.Status
member.summary: Gets the active or disabled status of the account.

member.name: M:ATMConsoleApp.Models.Account.UpdateBalance(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Updates the balance of the account.

member.name: T:ATMConsoleApp.Program
member.summary: The main entry point class for the ATM application.

member.name: M:ATMConsoleApp.Program.Main(System.String[])
member.summary: The main entry point method.

member.name: T:ATMConsoleApp.Services.IAtmService
member.summary: Defines the contract for ATM business logic.

member.name: M:ATMConsoleApp.Services.IAtmService.Withdraw(System.Int32,System.Decimal,System.String@)
member.summary: Processes a cash withdrawal.
member.param: Output parameter containing the error message if the withdrawal fails.

member.name: T:ATMConsoleApp.Services.AtmService
member.summary: Implements the ATM business logic and transaction validations.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Handles all console-based user interaction and rendering.
